历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 50109 → 36890 → 32794 → 28901 → 45178. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking continuously moved forward (increased competition), but in 2025, it significantly moved backward by about 16277 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 45178, showing drastic fluctuations. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 95 in 2021, 103 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 101 in 2024, and 98 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 98, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranks approximately 180–200, stable around 200 in recent years, belonging to the middle-to-late segment of 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or records of enrollment gaps. On Douyin, its university popularity ranks 106th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and unremarkable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above disciplines were found, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are socially popular, but Qinghai University is located in the western region, and its related majors have average competitiveness. The number of provincial Physics Category candidates grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with a total of 393,700 candidates in 2026. Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 251,000, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Qinghai University is located in Qinghai Province, a western university, with average regional appeal to Hubei candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Hubei is very small (95–103 Physics Category places from 2021 to 2025, a low proportion of the national plan), and cross-provincial application enthusiasm remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (slightly intensified competition) from the 2025 baseline of 45178. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 44878, with a range of 44378–45378.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学地处西北，对于湖北省考生而言属于跨省就读，地域距离较远，一定程度上影响报考 意愿。2026年湖北省医学类整体招生规模保持平稳，但青海大学医学类缩招1人，对位次产生一定上推压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年趋势，预测2026年青海大学医学类在湖北省最低录取位次约为43171名，较2025年（45178名）有所回升（位次数字减小约2007名），反映缩招及报考热 度小幅回升的影响。位次波动区间预计在42671至43671名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical programs in Hubei Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 2021: 25,780 (planned 10 students), 2022: 36,279 (planned 10 students), 2023: 29,066 (planned 13 students), 2024: 26,991 (planned 15 students), 2025: 45,178 (planned 15 students). In 2025, the ranking dropped sharply to 45,178, a decrease of about 67% compared to 2024, marking the lowest level in five years. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 14 students, a reduction of 1 student (a decrease of about 6.7%) compared to 2025, which will slightly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, it is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As an important university in the northwestern region, its medical programs have a certain influence within the area, but compared to universities in central China, it is at a relative disadvantage in terms of geographical appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other programs being particularly competitive. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, which means cross-province enrollment for Hubei candidates, with a significant geographical distance that affects willingness to apply to some extent. In 2026, the overall enrollment scale for medical programs in Hubei Province remains stable, but Qinghai University's medical programs are reducing enrollment by 1 student, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical programs in Hubei Province in 2026 will be approximately 43,171, an increase (ranking number decrease of about 2,007) compared to 2025 (45,178), reflecting the impact of enrollment reduction and a slight rebound in application popularity. The ranking fluctuation range is expected to be between 42,671 and 43,671.
